title: Faithful: PAELevels param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 5.0 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAELevels must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAELevels to range extremes across hosts ['Objects__Leaves', 'Stylized__Diagonal', 'Stylized__Light_Sweep', 'Stylized__Up-Over', 'Wipes__Diagonal'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=5.00 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAELevels implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAELevels` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/blackin", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 30.608, "ddb": 5.004}, {"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/blackin", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 104.651, "ddb": 6.075}, {"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/whitein", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 7.865, "ddb": 6.839}, {"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/gamma", "theta": 0.1, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 7.865, "ddb": 6.914}, {"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/blackin", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.9, "oracle_signal": 151.55, "ddb": 7.174}, {"host": "Stylized__Up-Over", "param": "histogram/rgb/blackin", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 7.865, "ddb": 7.179}]
